title: Morioka,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Morioka is a city in with a population of 290,000. A charming castle city surrounded by mountains, known for its three great noodles: wanko soba, jajamen, and reimen.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
